info.name: BREW Coffee House
info.tagline: Where The Little Moments are Treasured

menu.name: Mini Yummy Pancakes
menu.description: Buttermilk pancakes served with whipped cream, fresh strawberries and sprinkles.

menu.name: Happy Egg Meal
menu.description: Sourdough bread, egg, fresh cucumbers, cherry tomatoes, and grilled halloumi.

menu.name: Cream Cheese Zest
menu.description: Toasted sourdough with cream cheese, capers, fresh onion, and lemon zest.

menu.name: Oatmeal Bowl
menu.description: Oats, milk, and yogurt with apple, lychee, strawberry, banana, coconut, granola, tahini, and honey.

menu.name: Peanut Butter & Jam
menu.description: Peanut butter and jam on sourdough with granola, strawberries, banana, and cranberries.

menu.name: Avo Toast
menu.description: Sourdough with sour cream, cream cheese, smashed avocado, pomegranate and pumpkin seeds.

menu.name: Halloumi Toast
menu.description: Sourdough with fresh basil, grilled tomatoes, grilled halloumi, and oregano.

menu.name: Cheese Crumble Croissant
menu.description: Filled with Circassian cheese, caramelized onions, walnuts, mustard and chili flakes.

menu.name: Turkey Croissant
menu.description: Filled with turkey, cheese, tomato, mayo, mustard, and dried figs.

menu.name: Pancake
menu.description: Buttermilk pancake with banana, strawberries, and maple syrup.

menu.name: Club Toast
menu.description: Sourdough with cheddar, roast beef, sunny-side-up eggs (2), sun dried tomatoes and chili flakes.

menu.name: AvoBeet Scrambled
menu.description: Sourdough with beets, scrambled eggs (3), pumpkin seeds, and sweet paprika.

menu.name: French Toast
menu.description: Brioche in cinnamon-milk blend topped with blueberries and strawberries.

menu.name: Scrambled Egg
menu.description: Sourdough with spinach, scrambled eggs (3), sweet paprika, and pumpkin seeds.

menu.name: Spinach Omlette
menu.description: Sourdough with omelet (2 eggs), mushrooms, spinach, Gouda, pumpkin seeds and paprika.

menu.name: Espresso
menu.description: Rich and intense coffee shot.

menu.name: American Coffee
menu.description: Classic brewed coffee.

menu.name: Americano
menu.description: Espresso diluted with hot water.

menu.name: Latte
menu.description: Espresso with steamed milk and a light layer of foam.

menu.name: Cappuccino
menu.description: Espresso with equal parts steamed milk and foam.

menu.name: Flat White
menu.description: Espresso with microfoam.

menu.name: Mocha / White Mocha
menu.description: Espresso with chocolate and steamed milk.

menu.name: Caramel Macchiato
menu.description: Espresso with vanilla and caramel drizzle.

menu.name: Matcha (Tea/Latte)
menu.description: Premium Japanese green tea.

menu.name: Hot Chocolate
menu.description: Rich chocolate with steamed milk.

menu.name: Chai Latte
menu.description: Spiced tea concentrate with steamed milk.

menu.name: Tea
menu.description: Selection of premium loose leaf teas.

menu.name: Iced Americano
menu.description: Espresso served over ice and water.

menu.name: Cold Brew
menu.description: Slow-steeped cold coffee.

menu.name: Iced Latte
menu.description: Espresso and milk served over ice.

menu.name: Iced Shaken
menu.description: Espresso shaken with ice and flavor.

menu.name: Iced Mocha / White Mocha
menu.description: Iced espresso with chocolate milk.

menu.name: Iced Caramel Macchiato
menu.description: Iced vanilla latte with caramel drizzle.

menu.name: Iced Tea
menu.description: Brewed tea served over ice.

menu.name: Fresh Juice
menu.description: Freshly squeezed seasonal juice.

menu.name: Sparkling Drinks
menu.description: Refreshing sparkling beverages.

menu.name: Frappe
menu.description: Blended ice coffee drink.

menu.name: Smoothies
menu.description: Blended fruit and yogurt.
